component.name: YT Playlist
component.summary: Dedupe, merge, enrich and prune YouTube Music playlists

description.p: A local web tool to manage YouTube Music playlists across multiple brand identities: find duplicate and overlapping playlists, merge them while preserving order, copy and reorder tracks, find alternate versions of a song, enrich tracks with genre and year from MusicBrainz, and surface stale playlists to rediscover.
Everything runs on your machine. The app serves a web UI on 127.0.0.1 and talks only to YouTube Music and MusicBrainz; its data stays in the app's private sandbox directory.
